title: row_number() failing when used in join
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tradeDate (date Int32 NOT NULL, price Decimal(10, 2) NOT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY date;
CREATE TABLE tradeDetails (trade_id Int32 NOT NULL, trade_date Int32 NOT NULL, quantity Int32 NOT NULL) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY (trade_id, trade_date);
INSERT INTO tradeDetails (trade_id, trade_date, quantity) VALUES (1, 20230101, 10);
SELECT row_number() OVER (PARTITION BY trade_date ORDER BY quantity) AS row_num, td.trade_id FROM tradeDetails td JOIN tradeDate t ON td.trade_date = t.date;
